_comment: Maps Story Builder scene slugs -> REAL pokeemerald-expansion text labels to overwrite. The applier trusts ONLY this file, never the AI-supplied vanilla_event field. Every anchor was grep-verified in rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion. 'anchors' may list several labels; the scene's dialogue boxes are distributed across them in order, so list them in the order they play in-game (pre-battle box first, post-battle box last) to keep speakers on-screen when they talk.
